faqs.question: What causes fly infestations in Brownsville homes?
faqs.answer: Fly infestations in Brownsville typically result from improper food storage, uncovered garbage, moisture issues, or nearby sanitation problems common in densely populated urban areas. Multi-family buildings can experience shared infestations through common waste areas and building gaps.

faqs.question: Are your fly control treatments safe for families and pets?
